name: Sourdough Cornmeal Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons nonfat dry milk powder, or skim
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
2. Place the ingredients in the machine and select the dough program, then press start.
3. When the cycle ends, punch down the dough and transfer it to a loaf pan (grease and flour the pan if necessary).
4. Allow the dough to rise uncovered in a warm, draft-free area for 1 hour.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F and bake for 30-40 minutes until thoroughly browned.
